utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I realized it was stupid to get upset about not having a husband and kids .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I realized it was stupid to get upset about not having a husband and kids .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All I really needed was a plan .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: See I wanna have three kids

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh let me guess , and you wanna have them all at the same time and you wanna have them for your brother .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: As I was saying ... I should probably have the first of the three kids by the time I am 35 which gives me five years .
